name: radio-group
title: RadioGroup
description: Radio selection group (`ds-radio-group`) with vertical/horizontal layout, per-option isInactive, and keyboard navigation.

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by RadioGroup. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.

peerDependencies.frameworks: None — works with React 17+, Angular 12+, plain HTML, and any framework with Custom Element support.
